$comment: Reference definition only — NOT activated this sprint. Daily DRY-RUN of the Drive->YouTube replacement. Enabling requires Jeremy's approval. The --apply step is never scheduled.
name: lo-dev-video-drive-to-youtube-replacement
description: Daily DRY-RUN: read the YouTube upload-status manifest and report which LO Development clips are ready to flip from the Google Drive fallback to the YouTube embed. Writes a dated report; notifies Jeremy if anything is newly replaceable. Does not write the data file, commit, push, or deploy.

onSuccess.notifyMessage: Drive->YouTube replacement DRY-RUN: {{counts.newlyReplaced}} LO Development clip(s) now have a real YouTube id and are ready to flip. Review the report, then run `node scripts/replace-drive-with-youtube.mjs --apply` when approved.
